text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you know what the most thrilling scene is in a
play, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the moment of catharsis, where every emotion
that has been bottled up finally gets released.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to this moment since
tasting the bitter sting of defeat in the last race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But today is the day of my redemption, and all
shall witness my rise from the ashes!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The time is come! The curtains rise!
